# Test Ad 1: Strong DR Supplement Ad

**Expected quality band:** Strong DR control (~80-90)

## Ad Copy

When you look in the mirror these days, do you sometimes feel like you're looking at a stranger?

Because that's exactly how I felt three years ago when I first started noticing what I now call the "Three Phases of Eye Aging Shock."

Phase One was the crow's feet. I swear they appeared literally overnight. One day I'm putting on my makeup and suddenly there are these lines extending from the corners of my eyes that I'd never seen before — deep, etched lines that makeup couldn't hide.

Phase Two was the dark circles. No matter how much sleep I got, how much water I drank, or how many cucumbers I put on my eyes, I looked perpetually exhausted. People started asking me if I was "feeling okay" — if I was "getting enough rest." It was embarrassing.

And Phase Three was the worst — that moment when I realized the skin around my eyes had lost its elasticity. You know what I'm talking about... that firm, bouncy quality that young skin has.

Here's the thing nobody tells you: the reason your eye creams have failed you has nothing to do with the creams themselves.

After consulting with Dr. Michael Shilling — a board-certified dermatologist with over 22 years of clinical experience — I discovered the real culprit: the Dermal-Epidermal Junction (DEJ).

Think of the DEJ like a woven fabric. When you're young, the threads are tightly interlocked. But as you age, those threads stretch, twist, and pull apart — creating microscopic gaps between your skin layers. That's what causes the sagging, the thinning, the dark circles that no amount of surface-level moisturizer can fix.

Dr. Shilling identified a specific compound — a bioavailable collagen peptide complex called Revitaderm-7 — that penetrates past the surface layer and actually re-weaves the DEJ architecture from within.

In a 12-week clinical study, 87% of women saw measurable improvement in under-eye firmness. 93% reported their dark circles were visibly reduced. And the average participant looked 7.2 years younger according to independent dermatologist assessment.

What I'm offering you today is DermaThread Eye Restore — the only eye treatment on the market built specifically to target the DEJ.

For the next 48 hours, you can try DermaThread Eye Restore for just $49.95 (regularly $89.95) with our 90-day "Mirror Test" guarantee: if you don't look in the mirror and notice a visible difference within 90 days, return it for a full refund. No questions asked.
